dr10_v2_reachability_logic.cash_equity_cost_drag: per-share commission + ~1bp slippage tiny vs notional; even at higher rebalance cadence S2 cost_drag stays well under 5%
dr10_v2_reachability_logic.expected_status: CLEARS WITH STRONG MARGIN (cost_drag branch does not fire)
dr10_v2_reachability_logic.rule: v2 AND-conjunction (78cd22e): REJECT_FAST only if (turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05)

dr9_audit_framework.per_symbol_check_procedure: Per symbol: verify CSV exists + sha vs manifest; parse date,open,high,low,close,volume; gap_continuity vs NYSE calendar >=0.95; max_gap_ratio <=0.30 (calendar gaps; price jumps not gaps); quality_violation_count <=5; documented_split_event_consistency (each known split ratio ~1.0 under split_only); roll NOT_APPLICABLE; aggregate PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD.

split_event_consistency_requirements.GOOGL_2022_07_18_20to1: FRESH -- MUST verify ratio ~1.0 under split_only across 2022-07-18 (20x factor; the most consequential fresh split-consistency check)
split_event_consistency_requirements.no_split_fresh_names: V/MA/HD/PG/COST/ABBV/MRK/BAC/CAT/DIS/COP have no splits in window -> documented_split_event_consistency trivially PASS (verify at audit)
split_event_consistency_requirements.reused_splits: AAPL 4:1 / NVDA 4:1+10:1 / AMZN 20:1 / WMT 3:1 already verified at 245ac0d; re-verify only if re-fetched

explicit_exclusions_this_turn: No vendor API call by controller
No data fetch (operator-side at a future authorization)

No mechanic selection (deferred to s17 Tier-N PLAN)
No retroactive application of K13 to existing candidates
No modification of the reused s16 captured data or any sealed artifact
No canonical seal (this is a RUN_BOOK, not a seal)
framework_binding: DR10 v2 AND-conjunction (78cd22e) + walk-forward K13 persistence discipline (52a3b60) -- both bind this s17 candidate

k9_per_fold_and_k13_reachability_logic.binding_concern: Cross-sectional momentum ROTATION is structurally LOW-TURNOVER (rank + periodic rebalance), so K9-per-fold under the walk-forward K13 discipline (52a3b60) is the load-bearing reachability concern -- NOT raw universe size.
k9_per_fold_and_k13_reachability_logic.implication_for_plan: The s17 Tier-N PLAN MUST choose a rebalance frequency / top-N / trade-counting convention that demonstrably clears K9 in EACH of the 5 K13 folds (e.g., higher rebalance cadence -- weekly -- or counting per-name entries/exits as trades, or a larger held-N). If the PLAN cannot show K9-per-fold, the candidate is K13/K9-blocked. This RUN_BOOK flags it; it does NOT lock the mechanic.
k9_per_fold_and_k13_reachability_logic.k13_discipline: 5 sequential OOS folds; edge must be positive in >=3 of 5 folds + aggregate-positive + K9 holds (per discipline). Each fold (~1.4y of a ~7y history) must therefore carry enough realized round-trips.
k9_per_fold_and_k13_reachability_logic.trade_count_drivers: trades ~= rebalances/year x avg position-changes/rebalance. Monthly rebalance (~12/y) x top-N rotation on 24 names may yield only ~15-40 position-changes/y -> over a ~1.4y fold that is ~21-56, and K9 total floor is 100 / OOS >=50/y. K9-per-fold is TIGHT for a slow monthly rotation.
k9_per_fold_and_k13_reachability_logic.universe_breadth_helps_ranking_not_turno: 24 names give cross-sectional RANKING breadth (better selection), but turnover -- hence K9-per-fold -- is driven by rebalance cadence + held-N, which the PLAN must set.

low_data_friction_note: 12 of 24 names are ALREADY DR9-PASSED and reusable byte-equivalent from the s16 basket (245ac0d / result_seal ec856253). Only 12 require fresh Tiingo split_only fetch + full DR9.

motivation.k13_is_the_binding_gate: Per framework SEAL 52a3b60, this s17 candidate must clear K13 walk-forward persistence (>=3 of 5 OOS folds positive + aggregate-positive + K9 per discipline) at the new P6.7 phase before P10. The universe must support enough cross-sectional turnover for K9-per-fold.
motivation.mechanic_deferred_to_plan: Exact momentum spec (lookback, rebalance frequency, top-N, long-only vs long/short) is DEFERRED to the s17 Tier-N PLAN; this RUN_BOOK only establishes data availability + DR9.
motivation.why_this_universe: Selection plan rev2 (75a22be) recommended T2 (cross-sectional momentum rotation) as the most walk-forward-K13-aligned direction (relative momentum rotates into each regime's leaders, the structural fix for the s16 absolute-trend OOS failure). Cross-sectional momentum needs BREADTH to rank/select; a 24-name large-cap basket across ~8 sectors provides it.
